title: 11 Herbal Teas for African Americans to Treat and Prevent Hyperpigmentation
description: Ginkgo biloba teas are gaining attention for their potential benefits in reducing hyperpigmentation. This is due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids, which are powerful antioxidants that help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals. The flavonoids, specifically quercetin and kaempferol, have anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce melanin production, while the terpenoids, such as bilobalide and ginkgolides, have been shown to improve blood flow and reduc...
